project: BlackStone eIT - Project Delivery & Invoice Coordination System

stories.title: Client Model & Schema
stories.description: Create the Client database model with all BRD fields: name, code, country, sector, primary contact, finance contact, email, phone, billing address, portal name, portal link, notes. Add relation to Project (one-to-many). Migrate existing clientName strings on Projects into Client records.
acceptance_criteria: Client model exists in Prisma schema with all BRD fields
Project model has clientId FK replacing clientName string
Migration script converts existing clientName values to Client records

stories.title: Client CRUD Server Actions
stories.description: Create server actions for Client: createClient, updateClient, deleteClient. Validate uniqueness on clientCode. Prevent deletion if client has projects.
acceptance_criteria: createClient validates required fields and unique clientCode
deleteClient blocked if client has projects

stories.title: Client List Page
stories.description: Create /clients page showing all clients in a table with columns: name, code, sector, country, projects count, total contract value. Include search/filter. Add 'Clients' to sidebar navigation.
acceptance_criteria: Table displays all clients with key columns
Sidebar has Clients nav item between Dashboard and Projects
Empty state with CTA to add first client
PageHeader with '+ Add Client' action button

stories.title: Client Create & Edit Pages
stories.description: Create /clients/new and /clients/[id]/edit pages with a ClientForm component. Fields grouped: Company Info (name, code, country, sector), Contacts (primary, finance, email, phone), Billing (address, portal name, portal link), Notes.
acceptance_criteria: Create redirects to client detail page

stories.title: Client Detail Page
stories.description: Create /clients/[id] detail page showing client info, contact details, and a table of all associated projects with status, value, and milestone progress.
acceptance_criteria: Displays all client fields in clean layout
Projects table shows name, contract value, status, milestone progress
Edit button links to edit page
Financial summary: total contract value, invoiced, collected across all projects

stories.title: Update Project to Reference Client
stories.description: Update Project form and actions to select a Client from dropdown instead of typing clientName. Update project list cards and detail pages to show client from relation. Update all queries that reference clientName.
acceptance_criteria: Project form has client dropdown (not free text)
Project cards show client name from relation
Project detail page shows client as clickable link

stories.title: Expand Project Model Fields
stories.description: Add missing BRD fields to Project: projectCode, rfpReference, contractType, billingFrequency, accountManagerId (FK to ProjectManager or new AccountManager concept). Update form and detail page.
acceptance_criteria: New fields added to Prisma schema
Project detail page displays new fields

stories.title: Expand Milestone Model Fields
stories.description: Add missing BRD fields to Milestone: percentageOfContract (auto-calculated or manual), completionDate, responsiblePMId (if different from project PM). Update milestone form and list.
acceptance_criteria: Completion date recorded when status changes to COMPLETED

stories.title: Milestone Detail Page
stories.description: Create /milestones/[id] detail page showing milestone info, linked project, delivery note status, invoice status, and timeline of status changes.
acceptance_criteria: Shows milestone details: name, value, percentage, dates, status
Shows linked delivery note with status (or 'Not Required'/'Pending')
Shows linked invoice with status (or 'Not Created')
Status change buttons following the workflow transitions

stories.title: Delivery Note Create & Edit UI
stories.description: Build UI for creating and editing delivery notes from the milestone detail page. Fields: description, work delivered, issue date. Upload section for delivery note document.
acceptance_criteria: Create delivery note button appears on completed milestones that require one
File upload for delivery note document
Status shows as DRAFT after creation

stories.title: Delivery Note Status Workflow UI
stories.description: Build UI to transition delivery note through DRAFT → SENT → SIGNED workflow. Upload field for signed document. When SIGNED, milestone auto-transitions to READY_FOR_INVOICING.
acceptance_criteria: Mark as Signed button with signed document upload
Finance is notified (visual indicator for now)

stories.title: Expand Delivery Note Model Fields
stories.description: Add BRD fields: deliveryNoteNumber, issueDate, uploadedFileUrl, signedFileUrl, comments. Update form and display.
acceptance_criteria: Delivery note number auto-generated or manually entered
File URLs stored for both draft and signed documents

stories.title: Invoice Create & Edit UI
stories.description: Build invoice creation page/modal from milestones that are READY_FOR_INVOICING or INVOICED. Fields: invoice number, amount, VAT, total, submission method, portal name, payment due date, comments.
acceptance_criteria: Create invoice from milestone detail or invoices page

stories.title: Invoice Detail Page
stories.description: Create /invoices/[id] detail page showing invoice info, linked milestone/project, submission details, payment status, and payment history.
acceptance_criteria: Shows payment due date with overdue indicator

stories.title: Invoice Status Workflow UI
stories.description: Build status transition UI: DRAFT → SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED → PAID. Also handle REJECTED path. Record submission date when submitted.
acceptance_criteria: Status buttons show only valid next states
Payment due date required before submission
REJECTED invoices can be edited and resubmitted

stories.title: Expand Invoice Model Fields
stories.description: Add BRD fields: invoiceDate, submissionMethod (Portal/Email), portalName, paymentReceivedDate, comments, invoiceFileUrl.
acceptance_criteria: New fields in schema and form
Portal name shown when method is Portal

stories.title: Payment Recording UI
stories.description: Build UI to record payments against approved invoices. Form: amount, received date, reference number. Auto-mark invoice as PAID when fully paid.
acceptance_criteria: Add payment button on invoice detail (only APPROVED invoices)

stories.title: Expand Payment Model Fields
stories.description: Add BRD fields: paymentStatus, outstandingAmount (computed), paymentNotes. Show payment status on invoice list.
acceptance_criteria: Invoice list shows payment progress indicator

stories.title: Project Status Auto-Calculation
stories.description: Ensure project status automatically transitions: ACTIVE → FULLY_INVOICED (all milestones invoiced) → CLOSED (all invoices paid). This logic exists in actions but needs to trigger consistently across all status changes.
acceptance_criteria: Status recalculates after milestone status change
Status recalculates after invoice status change

stories.title: Finance Dashboard
stories.description: Create a finance-focused dashboard showing: total invoices issued, total payments received, outstanding invoices, overdue payments, invoice pipeline by status, payment performance trend.
acceptance_criteria: KPI cards: total invoiced, paid, outstanding, overdue
List of overdue invoices with days overdue

stories.title: Project Dashboard Enhancement
stories.description: Enhance existing dashboard with: upcoming milestones (next 30 days), milestones ready for invoicing, pending delivery notes, overdue milestones.

stories.title: Management Dashboard
stories.description: Create management reporting dashboard: revenue per client, revenue per project, invoice pipeline, payment performance, project health overview.

stories.title: Document Upload System
stories.description: Build reusable document upload component supporting: contracts, purchase orders, delivery notes, signed delivery notes, invoices, payment confirmations. Documents linked to client/project/milestone/invoice.
acceptance_criteria: File type validation (PDF, images, Office docs)
Documents listed with download links on entity detail pages

stories.title: Search & Filter on List Pages
stories.description: Add search and filter controls to all list pages: clients, projects, milestones, invoices. Filter by status, date range, client, project manager.
acceptance_criteria: Date range filter for milestones and invoices

stories.title: System Notifications — Visual Alerts
stories.description: Implement in-app notification system showing alerts for: milestone due soon (10 days), milestone overdue, delivery note missing, invoice pending, payment overdue. Display as a notification bell with badge count in sidebar.
acceptance_criteria: Notification bell icon in sidebar with unread count
Alerts generated based on BRD trigger rules
Click notification navigates to relevant entity

stories.title: Overdue & Upcoming Indicators
stories.description: Add visual indicators across the app for: milestones approaching due date (amber), overdue milestones (red), invoices approaching payment due (amber), overdue payments (red).
acceptance_criteria: Amber badge for items due within 10 days
Indicators appear on list pages, detail pages, and dashboard
Tooltip shows days until due or days overdue

stories.title: User Authentication
stories.description: Implement user authentication with login page, session management, and protected routes. Users table with email, password hash, name, role.

stories.title: User Roles & Permissions
stories.description: Implement role-based access control: Admin (full access), Project Manager (projects, milestones, delivery notes), Finance (invoices, payments), Account Manager (clients, read projects), Management (read-only dashboards).
acceptance_criteria: Role enum: ADMIN, PROJECT_MANAGER, FINANCE, ACCOUNT_MANAGER, MANAGEMENT
Server actions check user role before mutations
UI hides actions user cannot perform
Admin can manage users and assign roles

stories.title: User Management (Admin)
stories.description: Admin page to create, edit, deactivate users. Assign roles. Reset passwords.

stories.title: Audit Trail
stories.description: Log all financial record changes: who changed what, when, previous value, new value. Applicable to invoices, payments, milestone status changes.
acceptance_criteria: AuditLog model: entityType, entityId, action, userId, oldValue, newValue, timestamp
Admin can view full audit log

stories.title: Email Notifications
stories.description: Send email notifications for critical events: milestone overdue, delivery note missing after 5 days, payment overdue. Configurable per user.
acceptance_criteria: Email sent for missing delivery notes
User can opt-out of specific notification types
Email includes link to relevant page

stories.title: Data Export
stories.description: Allow exporting data to CSV/Excel: project list, milestone list, invoice list, payment reports. Filtered by date range and status.
acceptance_criteria: CSV download with current filters applied
